title: Luxury Travel Poster
sourceTitle: Create Luxury Travel Poster My Photo Split

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a luxury travel poster from my photo. Split layout: 35% top artwork, 65% bottom original photo. Keep the bottom image 100% unchanged. Top section: minimalist matte background sampled from the photo, small centered collectible souvenir magnet, realistic handcrafted enamel pin with thin gold contours, simplified scene based on the photo, luxury editorial typography. Add location name and country in elegant serif font. Premium travel branding, quiet luxury, Instagram carousel, vertical 3:4.
